add_key.summary: Identify the fitted immobiliser generation and transponder, retrieve the required PIN/security data, prepare the correct key and adapt all keys using a supported diagnostic route.
add_key.warning: Early vehicles vary by year and cluster; verify before programming.

all_keys_lost.summary: Read or retrieve the required PIN/security data from the supported cluster or immobiliser route, prepare the correct transponder and adapt the complete key set.
all_keys_lost.warning: Bench work may be required where diagnostic security access is unavailable.

add_key.summary: Identify the exact instrument cluster or KESSY variant, back up immobiliser data where supported, prepare a dealer key and perform Add Key adaptation.
add_key.warning: Support is dashboard and operation specific.

all_keys_lost.summary: Use a supported cluster or KESSY security-data route, prepare the dealer key and complete AKL adaptation only after exact hardware identification.
all_keys_lost.warning: Do not assume blanket OBD coverage.
